summary: Complete end-to-end user journey test for FREE11 app. Covered: Landing page, Login, Dashboard, Predict, Watch-Earn, Shop, Redemption, ShareCard, SkillDisclaimerModal, Blog, Admin V2, Leaderboard, Sponsored, Register/OTP. All 33 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend success rate: ~93%.

integration_issues.issue: Leaderboard shows 'No entries yet' because global leaderboard requires min_predictions >= 5. No qualifying users in test environment. Share button code IS implemented (data-testid='share-rank-{rank}') but cannot be tested without qualifying data.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - expected behavior, not a bug

integration_issues.issue: dev_otp code NOT shown inline for test email because Resend API returns HTTP 200 (email considered 'delivered' even if domain is unverified). dev_otp logic IS correctly implemented (lines 226-234 Register.js) and triggers when Resend returns non-200. MOCKED: Resend email delivery.

blog_page.article_title: FREE11 IPL 2026 Guide: Skill Predictions & Free Rewards

admin_v2.all_tabs_visible: PASS (Analytics, Sponsored, Match, Resolve, Wallet, Flags, Logs)

sponsored_page.pools_listed: PASS (3 pools visible: Fortune Atta, Parle-G, Pepsi IPL)

action_items: MINOR: Add seed data for leaderboard testing - users need >=5 predictions to appear in global leaderboard. Create fixture data or lower min_predictions threshold in dev environment.
MINOR: The Leaderboard Share button for top-3 entries (data-testid='share-rank-{rank}') is correctly implemented but cannot be verified without qualifying entries.
INFO: dev_otp fallback only triggers when Resend API returns non-200. Consider adding a test mode where dev_otp is always returned for @free11test.com domain.
critical_code_review_comments: Leaderboard min_predictions threshold (5 for global, 3 for weekly) means no entries in fresh test environments. Consider adding a /api/leaderboards/global?min_predictions=0 admin bypass or seeding test data.

otp_engine.py: _send_via_resend returns True (email_delivered=true) even for unverified domains because Resend accepts all emails with HTTP 200. This prevents dev_otp from showing in UI for testing. Consider always returning dev_otp when email domain matches test patterns.
All MOCKED APIs (ONDC, Xoxoday, Razorpay, Resend) are clearly noted and handled gracefully.
Shop page correctly shows 50 products with working category filters. All redemption dialogs working.

success_rate.frontend: 93% (13/14 major flows fully verified, 1 not testable due to no leaderboard data)

mocked_apis: Resend email - dev_otp fallback only when Resend fails
seed_data_creation: Redeemed 1 product (Lay's Chips 50g for 10 coins) during testing. Test user balance changed: 90 -> 100 (watched ad +10) -> 90 (redemption -10). Also created test OTP user test_otp_x1@free11test.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows work end-to-end. The /api/leaderboards/global and /weekly require min_predictions (5 and 3 respectively) so leaderboard stays empty in test env. dev_otp only shows when Resend fails. Test user: test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com / Test@1234 (balance ~90). Admin: admin@free11.com / Admin@123. Watch ad is at /watch-earn, earn coins overview is at /earn. Sponsored pool testid is sponsored-pool-{id} not pool-{id}. Login via Playwright: use desktop viewport + focus() + keyboard.type() approach (page.fill() unreliable in some test environments).

leaderboard_empty.issue: Leaderboard shows 'No entries yet' despite users existing in DB
leaderboard_empty.root_cause: /api/leaderboards/global?limit=50 returns empty array because it filters users with total_predictions < 5 (min_predictions threshold). The test user has 0 predictions.
leaderboard_empty.reproduction: Navigate to /leaderboards with a user who has <5 predictions
leaderboard_empty.mitigation: Seed test data with users having >=5 predictions, or use /api/leaderboard?type=global endpoint which shows all users by total_earned (no prediction threshold)
